meta.title: Stay at Farm El Baya - Private Rooms Under Olive Trees
meta.description: Three private rooms on a permaculture farm in Testour. Private bathrooms, breakfast included, direct rate from 180 DT/night, lunch and dinner on request.

hero: Private rooms under the olive trees.
intro: Three private rooms. Each with its own bathroom, its own light, and its own quiet. Breakfast is always included - made fresh from the farm each morning. This is not a hotel. It is a living farm that welcomes guests warmly.

breakfast.heading: What breakfast looks like
breakfast.text: Every morning, breakfast is set. Farm eggs cooked fresh. Olive oil pressed from trees you can see from your window. Homemade yogurt. Pomegranate seeds. Tunisian flatbreads. Seasonal fruit. Juice. This is how the day begins here.

cabin.label: COMING SOON
cabin.heading: The Olive Cabin
cabin.text: A standalone cabin being built among the olive trees. Private. Quiet. Its own outdoor kitchen. Its own sky. Join the list to be first to know.

nearby.heading: Nearby - beyond the farm
items: Testour town - 15 min · Pomegranates, Andalusian heritage, local market
Archaeological sites - 20-40 min · Roman ruins in the region
